<type>file</type>
<content>1: # Pipeline Health Monitoring Utility Module
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: 
5: Create a new utility module at `src/infra/utils/pipeline-health.ts` that exports a `PipelineHealthReport` class for monitoring Cody pipeline health.
6: 
7: ## Requirements
8: 
9: ### FR-001: PipelineHealthReport Class
10: Export a class with the following methods:
11: - `checkStageHealth(stage: string): HealthStatus` - Check health of a specific pipeline stage
12: - `generateReport(): Report` - Generate a full health report
13: - `getRetryRecommendation(failedStage: string): RetryStrategy` - Get retry strategy for a failed stage
14: 
15: ### FR-002: TypeScript Interfaces
16: Define the following interfaces:
17: - `HealthStatus` - Status object for individual stage health (stage, status, timestamp, message)
18: - `Report` - Full health report object (stages array, overallHealth percentage, generatedAt)
19: - `RetryStrategy` - Retry configuration object (maxRetries, backoffMs, strategyType)
20: 
21: ### FR-003: getStageTimeout Helper
22: Implement `getStageTimeout(stage: string): number` that returns default timeouts per pipeline stage. Must support stages: taskify, gap, clarify, architect, plan-gap, test, build, commit, review, fix, verify, docs, pr.
23: 
24: ### FR-004: Documentation
25: Add JSDoc comments on all exported members
26: 
27: ### FR-005: Validation
28: Include input validation using Zod schemas for all public method parameters
29: 
30: ### FR-006: Testing
31: Write companion unit test at `tests/unit/infra/utils/pipeline-health.test.ts` covering all public methods
32: 
33: ### NFR-001: HealthStatus Interface
34: **Priority:** MUST
35: **Description:** HealthStatus must include stage (string), status (enum: healthy | degraded | failed | unknown), timestamp (ISO string), and optional message (string)
36: 
37: ### NFR-002: Report Interface
38: **Priority:** MUST
39: **Description:** Report must include stages (array of HealthStatus), overallHealth (percentage number 0-100), and generatedAt (ISO string timestamp)
40: 
41: ### NFR-003: RetryStrategy Interface
42: **Priority:** MUST
43: **Description:** RetryStrategy must include maxRetries (number), backoffMs (number), and strategyType (enum: fixed | exponential | linear)
44: 
45: ## Acceptance Criteria
46: 
47: - [ ] `PipelineHealthReport` class exports successfully
48: - [ ] All three class methods are implemented and return correct types
49: - [ ] `HealthStatus`, `Report`, and `RetryStrategy` interfaces are defined with required properties
50: - [ ] `getStageTimeout` helper returns appropriate timeout values for all pipeline stages
51: - [ ] All exported members have JSDoc comments
52: - [ ] Zod validation schemas are defined and used in public methods
53: - [ ] Test file exists at `tests/unit/infra/utils/pipeline-health.test.ts`
54: - [ ] Tests cover all public methods
55: 
56: ## Guardrails
57: 
58: - Must NOT import directly from scripts/cody/stages/registry.ts to avoid tight coupling - define own stage list in this module
59: - Must follow existing utility patterns in src/infra/utils/
60: - Must use Zod validation as shown in src/infra/utils/validation/
61: 
62: ## Out of Scope
63: 
64: - Integration with actual pipeline runtime (this is a utility module only)
65: - Database persistence
66: - Real-time monitoring hooks

(End of file - total 66 lines)
</content>

metadata.preview:
# Pipeline Health Monitoring Utility Module

## Overview

Create a new utility module at `src/infra/utils/pipeline-health.ts` that exports a `PipelineHealthReport` class for monitoring Cody pipeline health.

## Requirements

### FR-001: PipelineHealthReport Class
Export a class with the following methods:
- `checkStageHealth(stage: string): HealthStatus` - Check health of a specific pipeline stage
- `generateReport(): Report` - Generate a full health report
- `getRetryRecommendation(failedStage: string): RetryStrategy` - Get retry strategy for a failed stage

### FR-002: TypeScript Interfaces
Define the following interfaces:
- `HealthStatus` - Status object for individual stage health (stage, status, timestamp, message)
- `Report` - Full health report object (stages array, overallHealth percentage, generatedAt)
- `RetryStrategy` - Retry configuration object (maxRetries, backoffMs, strategyType)

<type>file</type>
<content>210:    * Checks the health of a specific pipeline stage.
211:    * @param stage - The pipeline stage name to check
212:    * @returns HealthStatus object for the stage
213:    */
214:   checkStageHealth(stage: string): HealthStatus {
215:     // Validate input
216:     const parsed = stageInputSchema.safeParse(stage)
217:     if (!parsed.success) {
218:       throw new Error(`Invalid stage name: ${parsed.error.errors[0]?.message}`)
219:     }
220: 
221:     // Return existing data if available
222:     const existing = this.stageHealthData.get(stage)
223:     if (existing) {
224:       return existing
225:     }
226: 
227:     // Default: return healthy status
228:     return {
229:       stage,
230:       status: 'healthy',
231:       timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
232:     }
233:   }
234: 
235:   /**
236:    * Generates a full pipeline health report.
237:    * @returns Report object with all stage statuses
238:    */
239:   generateReport(): Report {
240:     const stages: HealthStatus[] = []
241: 
242:     // Collect health for all known stages
243:     STAGE_NAMES.forEach((stageName) => {
244:       const health = this.stageHealthData.get(stageName) || {
245:         stage: stageName,
246:         status: 'unknown' as const,
247:         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
248:       }
249:       stages.push(health)
250:     })
251: 
252:     // Calculate overall health percentage
253:     const healthyCount = stages.filter(
254:       (s) => s.status === 'healthy' || s.status === 'degraded'
255:     ).length
256:     const overallHealth = Math.round((healthyCount / stages.length) * 100)
257: 
258:     return {
259:       stages,
260:       overallHealth,
261:       generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
262:     }
263:   }
264: 
265:   /**
266:    * Gets a retry recommendation for a failed stage.
267:    * @param failedStage - The stage that failed
268:    * @returns RetryStrategy configuration
269:    */
270:   getRetryRecommendation(failedStage: string): RetryStrategy {
271:     // Validate input
272:     const parsed = stageInputSchema.safeParse(failedStage)
273:     if (!parsed.success) {
274:       throw new Error(`Invalid stage name: ${parsed.error.errors[0]?.message}`)
275:     }
276: 
277:     // Return strategy for known stage
278:     const strategy = STAGE_RETRY_STRATEGIES[failedStage]
279:     if (strategy) {
280:       return strategy
281:     }
282: 
283:     // Return default for unknown stage
284:     return DEFAULT_RETRY_STRATEGY
285:   }
286: }

(End of file - total 286 lines)

input.command:
cat << 'EOF' > /home/runner/work/A-Guy/A-Guy/.tasks/260319-systest-23281989096/build.md
# Build Agent Report: 260319-systest-23281989096

## Changes

- Created `src/infra/utils/pipeline-health.ts` - New utility module for pipeline health monitoring with:
  - `PipelineHealthReport` class with three methods: `checkStageHealth()`, `generateReport()`, `getRetryRecommendation()`
  - TypeScript interfaces: `HealthStatus`, `Report`, `RetryStrategy`
  - Zod validation schemas: `stageNameSchema`, `healthStatusSchema`, `retryStrategySchema`, `stageInputSchema`
  - Helper function: `getStageTimeout()` returning default timeouts per pipeline stage
  - All exports have JSDoc comments per FR-004
  - Input validation using Zod per FR-005
- Created `tests/unit/infra/utils/pipeline-health.test.ts` - Unit tests covering all public methods per FR-006

## Tests Written

- 26 unit tests covering:
  - STAGE_NAMES constant validation
  - Zod schema validation for stage names, health status, and retry strategies
  - getStageTimeout function for all known stages and unknown stages
  - PipelineHealthReport class: constructor, checkStageHealth, generateReport, getRetryRecommendation

## Acceptance Criteria Met

- [x] PipelineHealthReport class exports successfully
- [x] All three class methods implemented and return correct types
- [x] HealthStatus, Report, RetryStrategy interfaces defined with required properties (NFR-001, NFR-002, NFR-003)
- [x] getStageTimeout helper returns appropriate timeout values for all pipeline stages (FR-003)
- [x] All exported members have JSDoc comments (FR-004)
- [x] Zod validation schemas defined and used in public methods (FR-005)
- [x] Test file exists at tests/unit/infra/utils/pipeline-health.test.ts (FR-006)
- [x] Tests cover all public methods

## Quality

- TypeScript: PASS (`pnpm tsc --noEmit` - no errors)
- Lint: PASS (`pnpm lint` - no warnings)
- Unit Tests: PASS (26/26 tests passing)

## Deviations

None - plan followed exactly. The implementation follows all guardrails:
- Did NOT import from scripts/cody/stages/registry.ts (defined own STAGE_NAMES locally)
- Used existing utility patterns from src/infra/utils/
- Used Zod validation as shown in src/infra/utils/validation/
EOF

state.title: 0 todos

part.text:
Implementation complete. Here's the summary:

**Files Created:**
1. `src/infra/utils/pipeline-health.ts` - Pipeline health monitoring utility module
2. `tests/unit/infra/utils/pipeline-health.test.ts` - Unit tests (26 tests)

**Implementation Details:**
- `PipelineHealthReport` class with 3 methods:
  - `checkStageHealth(stage)` - Returns HealthStatus for a stage
  - `generateReport()` - Returns full Report with all stages
  - `getRetryRecommendation(failedStage)` - Returns RetryStrategy
- Interfaces: `HealthStatus`, `Report`, `RetryStrategy`
- Zod validation schemas for all public method inputs
- `getStageTimeout()` helper returning default timeouts per stage (taskify=10m, gap=15m, etc.)
- All exports have JSDoc comments

**Quality Gates:**
- TypeScript: ✅ PASS
- Lint: ✅ PASS  
- Unit Tests: ✅ 26/26 PASS
